description: Check the status of an envelope — who signed, who hasn't, download links. Works in both sandbox (sk_test_ keys) and live.

description.name: swiftsign_list_envelopes
description.description: List envelopes (sent documents) with their status. Scoped to your key's mode — sandbox (sk_test_) keys see test envelopes, live keys see live.

description.name: swiftsign_void_envelope
description.description: Cancel/void an envelope that hasn't been completed yet. Signers can no longer sign a voided envelope. Works in both sandbox (sk_test_ keys) and live.

description.name: swiftsign_download_signed_pdf
description.description: Download the completed, sealed PDF (or its Certificate of Completion) for an envelope. Only works once status is COMPLETED — run swiftsign_check_status first. Does NOT work on DRAFT or SENT envelopes; nothing has been signed yet on those.

description.name: swiftsign_upgrade
description.description: Initiate the upgrade to PRO ($15/mo flat). Returns a Stripe checkout_url that a human opens once to add a card — agents cannot complete the payment themselves. Moves the account from sandbox (sk_test_) to live sends. Returns status 'updated' if already on the plan.

description.name: swiftsign_create_embedded_url
description.description: Mint a short-lived embedded signing URL for a recipient (30-minute expiry). Returns a url to embed plus its expiresAt. The envelope must already be SENT. Works in both sandbox (sk_test_ keys) and live.

description.name: swiftsign_list_templates
description.description: List your saved templates. Scoped to your key's mode — sandbox (sk_test_) keys see test templates, live keys see live.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: swiftsign_send_envelope · Private data: swiftsign_send_envelope, swiftsign_list_envelopes · Public sink: swiftsign_send_envelope, swiftsign_confirm_send, swiftsign_send_from_template · Destructive: swiftsign_download_signed_pdf.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: swiftsign_send_envelope · Private data: swiftsign_send_envelope, swiftsign_list_envelopes · Public sink: swiftsign_send_envelope, swiftsign_confirm_send, swiftsign_send_from_template · Destructive: swiftsign_download_signed_pdf

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
